# Usage Account (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry Usage Account.

```terraform
data "foundry_usage_account" "example" {
  rid = "ri.foundry.main.usage-account.example-usage-account-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rid` (String) RID of the Usage Account. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the Usage Account.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the Usage Account.
- `enrollment_rid` (String) The RID of the Enrollment this Usage Account belongs to. This field is required if the resource is created within Terraform, but not necessarily if created outside of Terraform and imported.
- `internal` (Boolean) Whether this Usage Account is internal. Internal Usage Accounts are system-managed and cannot be modified or deleted.
